violations.text: The handle of the faucet at the hand wash sink was in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
The facilities is lacking a three compartment sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize equipment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2024
The handsinks throughout the facilities were lacking hot water. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2024
The plumbing under the hand sink was in poor repair (leak observed). New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
